question: If you are in an accident involving hazardous materials, you should:
canonical_answer:
a. Don't tell anything about your load.
b. Keep all people far away and upwind of the accident.
c. Prevent a panic by acting like nothing is wrong.
d. Tell only the emergency response team about the hazard.

B

appears_in.title: Arizona Hazmat Study Guide
appears_in.answer: Keep all people far away and upwind of the accident.
